creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that I've disabled the first SF.net address because the distfile has already been moved to the old-versions/1.8 directory.  Please re-enable the other location (which I've preserved as a comment in the line below) on your submission if you're updating pngcrush all the way.  Thanks.

Please also tag the next submission with [MAINTAINER UPDATE].
